final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing illustration of a 抖音 live-stream screenshot featuring a young woman resembling a "神仙姐姐" (ethereally beautiful celebrity-style figure) holding up a sign during a live broadcast.

Style/medium: needs a realistic live-stream screenshot aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be 9:16 vertical, mimicking a 抖音 live-stream UI layout with on-screen overlays (viewer count, comments, like animations, username bar)
Subject: must include a young woman (神仙姐姐 style — ethereal, elegant) holding a handwritten sign facing the camera
Scene/backdrop: must include a typical indoor live-stream room setting
Lighting/mood: needs a warm, bright live-stream studio atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！" on the sign held by the subject
Constraints: must preserve 抖音 live-stream UI visual conventions (top bar, bottom comment bar, floating hearts/likes)
Avoid: must avoid any real celebrity likeness or identifiable real person
